system.description:
Roll +Soul when you try to resist someone's influence.

10+: You resist their influence and take +1 forward if they try to influence you again.

7-9: You resist, but it lingers: take -1 forward to resisting further influence from them.

6-: You listen intently to their influence and do what they say.

results.success: You resist their influence and take +1 forward if they try to influence you again.
results.partial: You resist, but it lingers: take -1 forward to resisting further influence from them.
results.failure: You listen intently to their influence and do what they say.
